prompt: What percentage of students would recommend each course?

inputData.question: What percentage of students would recommend each course?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"What percentage of students would recommend each course?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"What percentage of students would recommend each course?"},"startedAt":1771855407789,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"To calculate the percentage of students who would recommend each course, I need to:
1. Join course_evaluations to enrollments to get course information
2. Join enrollments to course_sections to get the course_id
3. Join course_sections to courses to get course names/codes
4. Group by course and calculate the percentage of would_recommend = true
5. The would_recommend column is a boolean, so I can use SUM(CASE WHEN would_recommend THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100

The schema confirms:
- course_evaluations has would_recommend (boolean) and enrollment_id (FK to enrollments)
- enrollments has course_section_id (FK to course_sections)
- course_sections has course_id (FK to courses)
- courses has code and name for identification

I'll aggregate by course and calculate the recommendation percentage.","sql":"
SELECT 
  c.code,
  c.name,
  COUNT(ce.id) AS total_evaluations,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recommend_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(ce.id), 2) AS recommend_percentage
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
INNER JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY recommend_percentage DESC, c.code
","assumptions":["Assuming 'would_recommend' boolean field in course_evaluations indicates student recommendation","Assuming all courses with evaluations should be included in the result","Assuming percentage should be calculated as (recommend_count / total_evaluations) * 100"]},"endedAt":1771855440272},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

visualization.title: Percentage of Students Who Would Recommend Each Course

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  c.code,
  c.name,
  COUNT(ce.id) AS total_evaluations,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recommend_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(ce.id), 2) AS recommend_percentage
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
INNER JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY recommend_percentage DESC, c.code

visualization.title: Percentage of Students Who Would Recommend Each Course

result.sql:
SELECT 
  c.code,
  c.name,
  COUNT(ce.id) AS total_evaluations,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recommend_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(ce.id), 2) AS recommend_percentage
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
INNER JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY recommend_percentage DESC, c.code
